General.Name: Pioneer Global Group Ltd
General.Description: Pioneer Global Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the real estate investment business in Hong Kong and internationally. It operates through two segments, Properties and Hotels; and Investments and Others. The company invests in industrial, commercial, and residential properties, as well as hotels. Pioneer Global Group Limited was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: 68 Yee Wo Street, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
